data.name: 活體飛機杯工廠殲滅隊
data.detailed_description:
活體飛機杯工廠殲滅隊

在20XX年非法組織「飛機杯工廠」悄然誕生…

誘拐女性並將其作為飛機杯使用的「飛機杯工廠」誕生了。

雖然這個對男性非常"友善"的「飛機杯工廠」是違法的，工廠卻還是如雨後春筍般與日俱增，到現在已經有數不清的數量了。

為了將那些工廠全數驅逐而誕生的是，被稱為OLS組織的女性專屬戰鬥組織。組織由飛機杯工廠的受害者與厭惡男人的女性們組成。

主角(來栖川 蕾依)有著特殊體質，擁有強大的力量。

她以飛機杯戰士TYPE1的身分臥底在飛機杯工場，其目的為殲滅相關人員以及救出被害女性們。

第一舞台 廢工廠

每個工廠都有自各的特色，如果敗下陣來，就會被該工廠以特別的方式侵犯。

廢工廠是對大眾開放的飛機杯工場，在這裡，男人會將被抓來的女性當成飛機杯對待，天天侵犯她們。即使這些女性的小穴已經被幹到鬆鬆垮垮的，也得不到一絲救贖，毫無人權可言。

第二舞台 西邊酒廠

可以一邊欣賞女性飛機杯一邊享受酒和料理的特殊工廠。

在這裡的人很少自己使用飛機杯，經常是將飛機杯束縛住，用各種玩具使飛機杯一次次高潮，再一起欣賞飛機杯有趣的反應。

飛機杯在舞台上被玩弄，使用電動按摩棒豆豆、尿道、以及肛門，讓女性在大量的男人面前露出阿嘿顏，以及連續潮吹高潮的醜態。

第三舞台 ???

VIP和特殊人士才被允許進入的工廠。

被帶到這裡的女性都下落不明。

傳言說設備相當齊全，使用女性進行了很多實驗。

這裡有在賣大尺寸的飛機杯，而且不知為何這裡賣的飛機杯還會自己動起來。

據說是因為日日夜夜，持續的高潮導致女性們的身體產生變化。

  • 潛行戰鬥RPG遊戲

  • CG總數超過350張

  • 有回想房間

  • 毫無人性的色情事件

  • 遊玩時間3~6小時

  • 文本超過6萬字

  • 無碼CG

  • ●豐富的色情事件
    在這個世界被抓到的女人，都會變成可以讓男生隨心所欲的飛機杯。
    有監禁、卡牆play、多人運動等等事件等你來發掘。

  • ●轉蛋系統
    透過轉蛋來獲得超強武器，來教訓那些臭男人吧!

  • ●有投降功能
    戰敗的特務大家都知道下場會如何吧。

data.short_description: 在20XX年非法組織「飛機杯工廠」悄然誕生… 身為飛機杯戰士的蕾依，必須潛入工廠拯救出那些下落不明的女性！ 一旦戰敗，女特務會有什麼下場大家知道的吧?
data.supported_languages: 日文, 英文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

data.name: Fleshlight Squad - Fleshlightize -
data.detailed_description:
In the year 20XX, the illegal organization “Onahole Factory” was founded behind the scenes……

The “Onahole Factory”, which abducted women and used them as Onholes, was founded.

Although this “Onahole Factory” that is very “friendly” to men is illegal, the number of factories has mushroomed day by day, and now there is countless number of them.

To drive out all those factories, a female-only fighting organization called the OLS organization was born. The organization is made up of victims of the Onahole factories and women who hate men.

The main character(Kurusikawa Rei) has a special physique and inhuman strength.

She went undercover in the Onahole factory as the Onahole warrior TYPE1 to annihilate the relevant personnel and rescue the victims.

1. Abandoned Factory

Each factory has its own characteristics. If you lose, you will be violated by that factory in their designated way.

The abandoned factory is an Onahole factory open to the public. The captured women will be treated as Onaholes by men and will be violated every day, even if their vaginas are loose. They will not stop. There is no human rights at all.

2. Western Tavern

A special factory where you can enjoy wine and cuisine while admiring Onaholes.

People here rarely use Onaholes themselves. They often restrain Onaholes, use various toys to make Onaholes climax again and again, and then enjoy their interesting reactions together.

Onaholes are played with on the stage, while electric vibrators are used to violate their clits, urethra, and anus, making women show their ahegao and their embarrassing looks of having continuous squirting orgasms in front of a large number of men.

3. ???

Only VIPs and special personnel are allowed to enter this factory.

The whereabouts of the women who were brought here are unknown.

Rumor has it that the equipment is quite complete and many experiments were conducted using women.

There are large-sized Onaholes sold here, and for some reason, Onaholes sold here can move on their own.

It is said that the continuous orgasms day and night cause changes in women's bodies.

  • Stealth combat RPG game

  • Over 350 CG images

  • Recollection Room

  • Inhumane ERO events

  • About 3~6 hours playthrough

  • Text with over 60,000 words.

  • No mosaic CG

● Rich Ero events

Women who are caught in this world will become Onaholes who are at men's mercy.

There are events like imprisonment, glory holes, orgies, and more waiting for you to discover.

● Gacha System

Use Gacha to get super weapons and teach those stinky men a lesson!

● Surrender Function

Everyone knows what will happen to a defeated agent, right!

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10/11
  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
